title: Formatting a Date Range
scenario: A user wants to format a date range in the format 'YYYY-MM-DD' from a given start and end date. The target output should be a formatted string that displays the start and end dates. The output should not contain any unnecessary characters.
constraints: Must not contain any unnecessary characters

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the output is in the correct date format (YYYY-MM-DD)
Check if the output adheres to the constraints (not containing any unnecessary characters)
Check if the output is well-formatted and easy to read
